tree.name: Tre Jones
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Bulls traded Zach LaVine and a 2028 2nd round pick to Kings; Kings traded Kevin Huerter to Bulls; Kings traded De'Aaron Fox and Jordan McLaughlin to Spurs; Spurs traded Zach Collins, Tre Jones and a 2025 1st round pick (Noa Essengue) to Bulls.

assetsGivenUp.name: Zach LaVine
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Jimmy Butler and Justin Patton to Timberwolves for Zach LaVine, Kris Dunn, and Lauri Markkanen

assetsGivenUp.name: Jimmy Butler
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 30th overall by Chicago Bulls from Marquette in 2011 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via CHI
assetsGivenUp.note: Chicago's own 2028 2nd round pick, sent to SAC in LaVine mega-deal
